variants: Sufiya Usman is a dedicated professional at Arcturus Mining Syndicate, where she applies her knowledge from Zinnia Heights College to navigate the complexities of the mining industry. Beyond her work, she serves as the Custodian of Elmspire Historical Society, making a meaningful impact by preserving the area’s history. Sufiya is also a writer whose pieces have been published by Firebreak Spindle Press, often featuring her unique insights presented in Filipino sentences. Her passion for community engagement and history aligns seamlessly with her professional life.

Her commitment to both her profession and civic responsibilities exemplifies her deep-rooted connection to the Elmspire community.
